problem: Organizations struggle to manage environmental, health, and safety (EHS) data across disparate systems, making it difficult to ensure workplace safety compliance, prevent occupational injuries, and make data-driven decisions about employee health programs.
solution: Cority provides a unified EHS+ software platform that integrates occupational health management, safety incident tracking, industrial hygiene monitoring, and compliance reporting with AI-powered analytics to help organizations transform workplace health data into actionable insights.
